## Source evidence

- Official docs/source URL or public evidence:
- Docs access: public / gated / partner_only / unknown
- Confidence impact: A / B / C / unknown

## Checklist

- [ ] I did not add secrets, credentials, private docs, or customer data.
- [ ] Vendor, market, cultural, sales, or marketing claims are backed by source URLs or clear public evidence.
- [ ] Unknowns are marked honestly.
- [ ] `SKILL.md` stayed short and procedural.
- [ ] Evals were updated when behavior changed.
- [ ] I understand new public skills require maintainer approval before publication.
